name: Geoportail (IGN National Geoportal)
operator: Institut national de l'information geographique et forestiere (IGN)
dataType: Topographic maps, aerial imagery, cadastral parcels, elevation, land cover, historical maps
temporalResolution: updated annually to triennially depending on layer
temporalCoverage: 1950-present (historical aerial photos); current data continuously updated
formats: Web viewer, GeoJSON, Shapefile, GeoTIFF, GML
description: France's national geoportal providing interactive visualization of over 300 IGN map layers including orthophotos, topographic maps, cadastral data and elevation models, now mirrored on cartes.gouv.fr.

name: Hub'Eau - API Eau France
operator: Office Francais de la Biodiversite (OFB) / BRGM
dataType: Water quality, piezometry, hydrometry, drinking water quality, watercourse flow, temperature
temporalResolution: sub-daily to monthly depending on API endpoint
description: Unified REST API platform providing open access to 12 French national water databases covering hydrometry, piezometry, water quality, and drinking water with high-performance endpoints exceeding 20 requests per second.

name: BD TOPO - IGN Topographic Database
operator: Institut national de l'information geographique et forestiere (IGN)
dataType: 3D vector topography: buildings, roads, railways, hydrography, vegetation, administrative boundaries, points of interest
description: Comprehensive 3D vector description of France's territory including buildings, transport networks, hydrography, land use and administrative limits at metric precision, available as open data since 2021.

name: RGE ALTI / BD ALTI - IGN Elevation Models
operator: Institut national de l'information geographique et forestiere (IGN)
dataType: Digital terrain model (DTM) at multiple resolutions
spatialResolution: 1 m and 5 m (RGE ALTI); 25 m, 75 m, 250 m (BD ALTI)
temporalResolution: updated periodically with new LiDAR acquisitions
description: France's national elevation reference providing DTMs from 1 m to 250 m resolution derived from LiDAR and photogrammetry, covering metropolitan France and overseas departments.

name: OCS GE - Occupation du Sol a Grande Echelle
operator: Institut national de l'information geographique et forestiere (IGN)
dataType: Vector land cover and land use (2-dimensional model separating cover from use)
description: France's national large-scale land cover and land use vector reference used for monitoring soil artificialisation and spatial planning, covering metropolitan France and overseas departments at 1:2,500 scale.

name: Georisques - Portail des Risques Naturels et Technologiques
operator: Ministere de la Transition Ecologique / BRGM
dataType: Flood zones, seismic hazard, landslides, industrial risks (SEVESO), mining risks, radon, clay shrinkage-swelling, polluted sites (BASOL/BASIAS)
spatialResolution: parcel-level to 1:100,000 depending on hazard type
temporalResolution: updated continuously as new risk assessments are published
description: France's official natural and technological risk portal aggregating 30+ databases on flooding, seismicity, landslides, industrial hazards and polluted soils, providing address-level risk reports for 18,000+ daily visitors.

name: Theia Land Data Centre
dataType: Surface reflectance (Sentinel-2, Venus), land use maps (OSO), snow cover, water surfaces, evapotranspiration
spatialResolution: 10 m (Sentinel-2) to 250 m depending on product
temporalResolution: 5 days (Sentinel-2 revisit); monthly syntheses; annual land use maps
description: French multi-institutional data centre providing analysis-ready satellite products for land surfaces including atmospherically corrected Sentinel-2 imagery, annual land use maps and biophysical variables, accessible via the GEODES platform.

name: PREV'AIR - Air Quality Forecasts
dataType: Ozone (O3), nitrogen dioxide (NO2), particulate matter (PM10, PM2.5) forecasts and analyses
temporalResolution: daily forecasts (up to J+3); daily analysis maps
description: National operational air quality forecasting system providing daily maps of ozone, NO2 and particulate matter concentrations at 2 km resolution over metropolitan France and Europe, operational since 2003.

name: ADES - Acces aux Donnees sur les Eaux Souterraines
operator: BRGM / Ministere de la Transition Ecologique
dataType: Piezometric levels, groundwater chemistry, 83,000+ monitoring points, 5,700+ piezometers
description: France's national groundwater data portal providing access to quantitative (piezometric levels) and qualitative (chemistry) data from over 83,000 monitoring points, managed by BRGM as part of the national water information system.

name: SISPEA - Observatoire des Services Publics d'Eau et d'Assainissement
dataType: Drinking water pricing, distribution performance, leakage rates, sanitation compliance, service indicators for 7,000+ water utilities
description: National observatory of public water and sanitation services collecting annual performance indicators (pricing, quality, leakage, compliance) from over 14,000 drinking water and sanitation services across France.

name: IGN Geodesie - Reseau Geodesique Francais (RGF93)
operator: Institut national de l'information geographique et forestiere (IGN)
dataType: Geodetic control points (RRF 23 sites, RBF 1,009 sites, RDF ~80,000 points), permanent GNSS stations (RGP), gravity measurements, vertical datums (NGF-IGN69)
spatialResolution: millimeter to centimeter accuracy (GNSS); decimeter (leveling network)
description: France's official geodetic reference infrastructure providing access to the RGF93 coordinate system (French realization of ETRS89), permanent GNSS network data, leveling benchmarks and coordinate transformation tools.

name: BD PARCELLAIRE / PCI - Cadastral Parcel Database
operator: Institut national de l'information geographique et forestiere (IGN) / DGFiP
dataType: Cadastral parcel boundaries, parcel identifiers, sections, communes, ownership links
spatialResolution: parcel-level (metric positional accuracy in PCI Vecteur)
description: France's national cadastral parcel database assembling the dematerialized cadastral plan (PCI) with vector and raster representations of all land parcels, available as open data through WMS/WFS services.

name: Atmo Data - Federation Atmo France
operator: Atmo France (federation of AASQA regional air quality associations)
dataType: ATMO air quality index by commune, pollution episodes, observed concentrations (NO2, O3, PM10, PM2.5, SO2), emission inventories, population exposure
temporalCoverage: 2021-present (Atmo Data platform); underlying AASQA data from 1990s
description: National aggregator providing unified open access to air quality monitoring data from all 18 regional AASQA associations, including daily ATMO index, station observations, emission inventories and pollution episode alerts.

name: SSP-InfoTerre - Sites et Sols Pollues (BASOL/BASIAS)
operator: BRGM / Ministere de la Transition Ecologique
dataType: Polluted sites requiring remediation (BASOL), historical industrial sites inventory (BASIAS), Secteurs d'Information sur les Sols (SIS)
temporalResolution: updated continuously as site assessments progress
description: National database of polluted and potentially polluted sites merging the BASOL (sites under remediation action) and BASIAS (historical industrial inventory) registers, managed by BRGM and accessible through the SSP-InfoTerre portal and Georisques.
